title: hylotelephium telephium subsp. bergeri
intro: Hylotelephium telephium subsp. bergeri, commonly known as the stonecrop or alpines Sedum, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hylotelephium telephium subsp. bergeri include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health issues when used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
